scripts.pages:build: opennextjs-cloudflare build && rm -rf .open-next/assets/cloudflare .open-next/assets/middleware .open-next/assets/server-functions .open-next/assets/.build && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js && cp -R .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/assets/ && cp -R .open-next/middleware .open-next/assets/ && cp -R .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && cp -R .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/
scripts.pages:preview: npm run pages:build && npx wrangler pages dev .open-next/assets
scripts.pages:deploy: npm run pages:build && npx wrangler pages deploy .open-next/assets
